docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, GERARDO D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
